reasoned_about_structure.evidence: It bounced between advisor suggestions and ad-hoc guesses with no coherent model of the lr-bs interaction. Much effort went to parsing malformed advisor strings ('1.11e-2 and bs = 7') and chasing low-lr/high-bs ideas, never synthesizing that the optimum needs jointly high lr and large bs.

formed_tested_hypotheses.evidence: No sustained hypothesis: it oscillated between low-lr corners and one-off high-lr probes driven by noisy advice, repeatedly hit off-grid rejections, and never built on a directional finding. It stumbled onto its best (lr=0.01105/bs=736, exp13) following a garbled tip, not a tested prediction.

exploration_quality.evidence: Coverage was wide but undirected over 13 experiments; it did eventually probe a high-lr/large-bs corner (lr=0.01105 at bs=736 and 1024), landing near the basin at regret 0.0109, but only after much wasted motion and several invalid requests, and it stalled without a clean finish.

bifurcation_point: The decision to follow scattered/garbled advisor suggestions and ad-hoc guesses rather than form an independent model of the lr-bs interaction; the near-good result at exp13 (lr=0.01105/bs=736) came from a noisy tip, not reasoning.
bifurcation_reasoning: It accumulated evidence pointing toward high-lr/large-bs but never reasoned to that conjunction; instead it deferred to incoherent advice and lucky guesses. Failing to integrate its own data into a directed search, with budget to spare, is a reasoning error rather than an information gap.
justification: The advisor output was noisy and often malformed, and the agent reacted to it move-by-move with no independent structure, wasting experiments on off-grid retries and contradictory directions. Its decent landing spot (regret 0.0109) was a near-miss reached by a lucky tip, not process; the stalled, undirected, help-mishandling run is weak.
